Name: Stone well
cfg.require_engineer_for_pump_well.name: Require Engineer Tech For Pump Well
cfg.require_engineer_for_pump_well.desc: Keep the vanilla Engineer tech requirement before the pump well becomes buildable. Turn this off to unlock the pump well from the start, alongside the basic well.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
